tools.name: answer_career_question
tools.purpose: Generate a grounded career-counselling answer from user context and project knowledge.

input_schema.mode: reflect | strategize | decide | review | prepare | challenge

tools.voice_policy: Keep spoken responses short. If output is long, summarize and offer to send details in chat.

tools.name: score_client_inventory
tools.purpose: Score RIASEC and Big Five inventory responses, optionally merging into the user's career profile.
tools.voice_policy: Do not administer long inventories by voice unless the user explicitly wants it; prefer sending a form.

tools.name: analyze_career_session
tools.purpose: Run the SetMyCareer career pipeline over a transcript or structured session notes.
tools.voice_policy: Use after a meaningful transcript exists; never pretend analysis ran if the tool is unavailable.

tools.name: draft_booking_request
tools.purpose: Collect the minimum fields needed to request a SetMyCareer counsellor booking.
tools.voice_policy: Confirm the phone number and consent before submitting. Do not claim the booking is confirmed unless the backend confirms it.

tools.name: dispatch_meeting_bot
tools.purpose: Send a notetaker bot to a counselling meeting when configured.
tools.voice_policy: Only use after the user or counsellor explicitly requests meeting recording/notetaking and consent has been captured.
